generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign tech giants are exploiting our reliance on their systems to undermine our national security? By pushing for strategic autonomy, we're not just protecting our data—we're safeguarding our sovereignty. Don't let them divide us with fear. Stand with allies who prioritize our security over corporate profits. #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
